name: Greek Gigantes Plaki

ingredients.item: Four tablespoons of finely chopped celery
Two cups of finely chopped tomatoes
One teaspoon of dried oregano leaves
A pinch of freshly crushed black pepper
Four tablespoons of finely chopped parsley

method: Add in the olive oil and onions.
Cook the onions until they become soft and fragrant.
Add the chopped garlic into the pan.
Cook the mixture and add the tomatoes into it.
Cover the dish with a lid.
Cook the tomatoes until they turn soft.
Add the beans into the pan.
Add the water, salt, and black pepper into the pan.
Mix the ingredients carefully and cover the pan.
When the beans are cooked, dish them out.
Garnish the dish with chopped celery and parsley leaves on top.
Your dish is ready to be served.
